item.title: Indian Stocks Risk Deeper Underperformance as Tech-Led North Asia Draws Funds
item.description: Market’s appeal among Asia money managers has eroded.

item.title: OCBC Is Said to Emerge as Lead Bidder for HSBC Indonesia Assets
item.description: Oversea-Chinese Banking Corp. has emerged as the preferred bidder to buy HSBC Holdings Plc’s retail assets in Indonesia, people familiar with the matter said, as the Singaporean lender seeks to boost its presence in Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

item.title: Military Drone Maker Aevex Raises $320 Million in US IPO
item.description: Aevex Corp., a maker of military drones, raised $320 million in its initial public offering, as investment in modern defense and autonomous systems rises.

item.title: GIC-Backed Envision AESC Is Said to Mull Up to $2 Billion HK IPO
item.description: Envision AESC, a major global manufacturer of lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles and energy storage systems, is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong as soon as this year, according to people familiar with the situation.

item.title: Venezuela Central Bank Chief Resigns, VP Perez to Take Over
item.description: Venezuela’s central bank chief resigned, interim President Delcy Rodriguez said, days after the US eased sanctions on the bank, allowing it to reconnect with the international financial system.

item.title: Flow Capital Puts $150 Million Private Credit Fund on Blockchain
item.description: Flow Capital Partners plans to offer its $150 million private credit fund on a Singapore-based blockchain platform by month end, positioning itself among the first Asian managers to tap growing stablecoin liquidity.

item.title: UBS’ Senior Indonesia Wealth Banker Leaves Amid Several Exits
item.description: UBS Group AG’s senior wealth banker Lionel Yoong has left the Swiss firm, adding to several recent departures from the group covering Indonesia from Singapore.

item.title: Credit Growth to Lift India Bank Profits Despite Likely FX Losses
item.description: Strong credit growth should have kept fourth-quarter numbers healthy at Indian banks including HDFC Bank Ltd. and ICICI Bank Ltd., though earnings may have been dented by trading losses linked to the central bank’s rupee derivatives curbs.

item.title: Pemex Undersea Pipeline Found to Cause Gulf Oil Spill
item.description: An oil spill in the Gulf of Mexico that soiled beaches, killed wildlife and sparked outrage from environmental groups was caused by a leaky pipeline owned by state oil company Petroleos Mexicanos, the company said.

item.title: Medical Device Maker Alamar Bio Boosts IPO to Raise $191 Million
item.description: Alamar Biosciences Inc., a maker of medical devices that detect protein biomarkers to diagnose diseases, raised $191 million in an upsized US initial public offering that priced at the top of a marketed range.

item.title: Australia’s Treasurer Flags War-Led Inflation Risk Before Budget
item.description: Australian Treasurer Jim Chalmers warned the global economy faces a “really dangerous moment” as the Middle East conflict threatens to accelerate inflation and drag on activity, complicating the outlook ahead of his delivery of a pivotal budget next month.

item.title: BOJ’s Ueda Cites Upside, Downside Risks as He Avoids Clear Hints
item.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stressed the challenges for policymakers as they cope with upside risks to prices and downside risks to the economy stemming from the Middle East conflict, avoiding a clear signal on rates ahead of the bank’s policy decision this month.

item.title: Wall Street Turns Gloomy on the Dollar as Haven Demand Fades
item.description: Deutsche Bank AG and Wells Fargo & Co. are among banks declaring the dollar’s war-driven haven rally is likely over as the fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran prompts investors to seek riskier assets.

item.title: China Fund Beating 98% of Peers Bets on AI Chain, Healthcare
item.description: A top-performing China Asset Management Co. fund manager says the country’s artificial intelligence stocks are far from bubble territory and is bullish on opportunities across the value chain.

item.title: Obesity Treatment Firm Kailera Upsizes IPO to Raise $625 Million
item.description: Kailera Therapeutics Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on obesity, raised $625 million in an upsized initial public offering, marking the sector’s biggest US listing since 2021.

item.title: QVC Shopping Channel Files Bankruptcy to Cut $5 Billion of Debt
item.description: Television shopping network QVC Group filed for bankruptcy Thursday as part of a plan to cut more than $5 billion of debt, as declining viewership and a shift to online retail weighed on sales and squeezed margins.

item.title: Sequoia’s New Leaders Raise About $7 Billion for Firm’s Biggest Bets
item.description: Sequoia Capital, one of the largest and most prominent venture capital firms, has raised about $7 billion for a new fund according to people familiar with the discussions — the first fresh fundraising under Sequoia’s new leadership.

item.title: Permian Landowner EagleRock Files for Initial Public Offering
item.description: EagleRock Land LLC filed for an initial public offering as the Permian Basin landowner and management company seeks to expand holdings and attract power generation, data centers and other industrial developments that could benefit from being near energy sources.

item.title: Nvidia Alum Rides China’s Robotics Wave to $150 Million Debut
item.description: Manycore Tech Inc. built a billion-dollar valuation in China’s once-sizzling real estate market. Now, the software unicorn is betting on robotics and AI for its second act.

item.title: Gold Heads for Fourth Weekly Gain on Optimism for US-Iran Truce
item.description: Gold headed for a fourth weekly gain after President Donald Trump expressed optimism that the US and Iran could agree a permanent ceasefire to end the war that’s upended markets and heightened inflation fears.

item.title: Crude Falls on Optimism Over Iran Ceasefire Deal: Markets Wrap
item.description: Oil dropped in early Asian trading after President Donald Trump expressed optimism about securing a permanent ceasefire with Iran ahead of the expiry of the current truce next week.

item.title: Oil Drops as Trump Strikes Upbeat Tone on Outlook for Iran Deal
item.description: Oil fell as President Donald Trump struck an optimistic tone on prospects for a permanent ceasefire between the US and Iran.

item.title: Century Aluminum Sees Expansion Delivering 10% Lift to US Output
item.description: Century Aluminum Co. started producing metal from an expansion at its South Carolina smelter in a rare increase in US aluminum output.

item.title: SpaceX Moves Up Vesting Schedule for Employee Shares Before IPO
item.description: SpaceX has moved up a scheduled vesting date for shares awarded to employees to as soon as next week, according to people familiar with the matter, ahead of an IPO targeted to value the company at more than $2 trillion.

item.title: The $10 Billion Startup Training AI to Replace the White-Collar Workforce
item.description: Mercor is promising to replicate most professional work. It was also co-founded by twentysomethings who previously never held a real job.

item.title: Iran War Pushes Asia to Think Twice Before Doubling Down on LNG
item.description: A record wave of new liquefied natural gas supply was meant to usher in a prolonged period of lower prices. Governments from India to Southeast Asia crafted energy strategies that would allow them to use the surplus to move away from a heavy reliance on coal.

item.title: Treasury’s Cash Pile Jumps Most Since September on Tax Day
item.description: Tax‑day inflows jolted the US Treasury’s cash balance on Wednesday, lifting it by the most since September, a shift that briefly pulled liquidity out of the financial system even as pressures remained contained.

item.title: Kone Is in Advanced Talks to Acquire TK Elevator
item.description: Kone Oyj is in advanced talks to acquire TK Elevator in what’s set to be one of Europe’s biggest takeovers this year, people familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Anthropic’s Mythos a ‘Potent’ Tool for Cyber, Early Testers Say
item.description: The new AI model represents a sharp improvement from prior offerings, according to people who’ve tried it.

item.title: Netflix Earnings Forecast Misses, Reed Hastings Steps Down
item.description: Netflix Inc. gave a forecast for the second quarter that fell short of analysts expectations, sending the shares down in extended trading.
